Other Treatments
Spravato (Esketamine) FDA-approved nasal spray for treatment-resistant depression. Ketamine Therapy Rapid-relief IV infusions for severe depression & mood disorders.

Insights & Education

The Psychiatry & TMS Blog

Evidence-based articles on brain stimulation therapy, psychiatric care, and mental wellness — written by Dr. Ritesh Amin and his clinical team.

Featured Articles

TMS Therapy July 13, 2026 · 4 min read

Who Is a Good Candidate for TMS Therapy? A Complete Guide

Not everyone is a candidate for Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy. Learn who makes an ideal candidate, what conditions qualify, and how to determine if TMS is right for you.

Read Article →
TMS Therapy June 12, 2026 · 4 min read

Is TMS Therapy Legitimate? Science, FDA Approval, and Clinical Evidence

Curious if Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) is a legitimate medical treatment? Explore the clinical evidence, FDA clearances, and real patient outcomes that substantiate TMS.

Read Article →
TMS Therapy May 19, 2026 · 4 min read

How Much Does TMS Cost With Insurance? A Complete Guide

Wondering about the cost of Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS)? Understand how insurance coverage works, out-of-pocket costs, and financing options for TMS therapy.

Read Article →
TMS Therapy April 13, 2026 · 4 min read

Does TMS Help with Anxiety? A Complete Guide

Anxiety can feel overwhelming. If you’ve tried therapy or medications and still don’t feel like yourself, you may have come across Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) as a treatment option.

Read Article →
